__llm_logo_reasoning.reasoning: Selected #4 because it is located in the header, is visible, and matches the brand name 'Framer'. It also links to the homepage, which is a strong indicator of being the main logo.

primary.reasoning: Button #2 'Start for free' is likely the primary CTA due to its action-oriented text and the fact that it is on a light background, making it stand out against the dark-themed site.

secondary.reasoning: Button #0 'Start with AI' is chosen as secondary because it has a different background color group (dark) and offers an alternative action.

rawLogoSelection.selectedLogoReasoning: Selected #4 because it is located in the header, is visible, and matches the brand name 'Framer'. It also links to the homepage, which is a strong indicator of being the main logo.

metadata.description: Build a free website with Framer—enjoy full design freedom, powerful CMS, built-in SEO, and real-time collaboration. Create professional, fully custom sites with the no-code builder loved by designers and high-performing teams.
